name: Bully’s Birthday Gift
description:
She told you to show up to her party on Sunday night, and to bring a gift. Now you’ve arrived with a scarf, standing outside her mansion. You knew she was rich but this is ridiculous.

Backstory: You met Camilla in university, talking to her after giving her a notebook she left behind. She told you about her rich family and being from Spain, and you acted like usual. Something changed in her pretty quick after that.

Camilla started bullying you. Kinda, never anything really mean. Just a lot of name calling and teasing. She buys you lunch and talks the whole meal about how you’re eating off her dime. Any group project you have, she’s got to be your partner. Then she complains how you’re just gonna ride her coattails the whole time.

Now it’s Camilla’s 21st birthday and she has something big planned. She’s been very adamant about you showing up Sunday for a big party. Weirdly enough, no one else around has said a word about it. So now you’re showing up with a sub-par scarf (you had to bring a gift to enter) for a party.

She’s Spanish, 5’11”, doesn’t like cold weather.

More info in personality if you want (does contain spoilers [not really that big, most of it is in the first message])

Personal Stuff: New bot. Tweaked the personality section a bit, and then added a big jumble of stuff to the rest of the bot. It looks pretty messy honestly, but I have more coming out that are a lot better. Tomorrow’s one should be better. And it’ll be slow burn (this one is kinda slow burn, or she might straight up start undressing. It’s kinda bipolar with the direction of the first message).

Other than that, I ain’t been studying properly. I gotta do good on these exams, and I have NOT been studying that well at all. Although MARK MY WORDS, I’m finishing a final test for botony tomorrow and will return saying I have locked in one course. Then I got 3 more exams that make me anxious as hell.

Song for today: Party and Bullshit by The Notorious B.I.G.

Art Source: OrangeWink on pixiv
creator: FungusLord
